vulnerabilities.description: CORS is configured with a wildcard '*' which allows any origin to access the resources, increasing the risk of cross-site request forgery (CSRF) and other attacks.
vulnerabilities.fix: Replace '*' with a specific list of allowed origins by changing `origin: process.env.ALLOWED_ORIGINS || '*'` to only allow specific trusted domains.

vulnerabilities.description: JWT secret is accessed using `process.env.JWT_SECRET!` without proper validation. If it's undefined, it will cause runtime errors.
vulnerabilities.fix: Validate JWT secret using a config validation library like Zod to ensure it is properly set before starting the application.

vulnerabilities.description: Lack of RBAC/ABAC for authorization checks. There's no middleware implemented to handle permissions.
vulnerabilities.fix: Implement middleware to enforce role-based or attribute-based access control (RBAC/ABAC) to secure sensitive endpoints.
